sessions.title: Chat History
sessions.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this chat session? This action cannot be undone.
sessions.deleteAllConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all chat sessions in this mode? This action cannot be undone.

selectors.mentorSubtitle: Choose a specialized AI mentor to assist you with specific topics
selectors.resourceSubtitle: Chat with your uploaded documents or resources for precise knowledge extraction

messages.empty: Start a new conversation by sending a message below!

general.title: General Chat
general.description: Use General Chat for open-ended learning questions, explanations, planning, and quick help.

usedForItems.first: Ask questions that are not tied to a specific mentor or uploaded resource.
usedForItems.second: Use optional tools, such as web search, when you need current or external information.
usedForItems.third: Keep separate conversations in chat history so each topic stays organized.

howToItems.first: Start a new chat or select an existing conversation from history.
howToItems.second: Enable tools from the tool button when the answer should use external web information.
howToItems.third: Type your question and send it. Use Stop if you want to cancel a streaming response.
howToItems.fourth: Copy useful answers or delete old conversations from the history panel.

general.note: For best results, include the goal, context, and constraints in your question.

mentor.title: Mentor Chat
mentor.description: Use Mentor Chat when you want a guided conversation with a specialized AI mentor.

usedForItems.first: Choose a mentor configured for a subject, role, learning style, or goal.
usedForItems.second: Get answers shaped by that mentor's instruction and allowed tools.
usedForItems.third: Keep separate history for each mentor so conversations stay focused.

howToItems.first: Select a mentor from the list before starting the conversation.
howToItems.second: Ask questions that match the mentor's specialty or learning goal.
howToItems.third: Use the mentor selector button in the chat header to switch to another mentor.
howToItems.fourth: Create or edit mentors from the Mentors page when you need a different behavior.

mentor.note: A focused mentor works best with focused questions. Mention your level, goal, and where you are stuck.

resource.title: Resource Chat
resource.description: Use Resource Chat to ask questions grounded in one of your uploaded resources.

usedForItems.first: Choose a resource and ask questions about its content.
usedForItems.second: Extract explanations, summaries, key points, and study notes from uploaded material.
usedForItems.third: Keep separate history per resource so each document's conversation stays organized.

howToItems.first: Select a resource from the list before starting the conversation.
howToItems.second: Ask specific questions about the document, section, concept, or example you need.
howToItems.third: Use the resource selector button in the chat header to switch documents.
howToItems.fourth: Upload or update resources from the Resources page when the needed document is missing.

resource.note: Better indexed documents produce better answers. If an answer is too broad, ask about a specific section or concept.

mentor.title: Mentors
mentor.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
mentor.empty: No mentors yet. Create your first mentor!

help.title: Mentors
help.description: This page helps you create and manage specialized AI mentors for focused learning conversations.

usedForItems.specialize: Create mentors for specific subjects, roles, learning styles, or study goals.
usedForItems.guide: Define instructions so each mentor answers with the behavior and scope you expect.
usedForItems.tools: Enable tools when a mentor should use extra capabilities during a conversation.

howToItems.create: Select Create Mentor and provide a clear name and description.
howToItems.instruction: Write the instruction that explains how the mentor should teach, respond, and limit its scope.
howToItems.tools: Choose the tools the mentor is allowed to use, if the mentor needs them.
howToItems.chat: Open Mentor Chat and select the mentor when you want a guided conversation.

help.note: A precise instruction makes the mentor more consistent. Include the target audience, tone, topic boundaries, and preferred teaching style.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 1000 characters or fewer
validation.instructionTooLong: Instruction must be 4000 characters or fewer

resource.title: Resources
resource.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
resource.empty: No resources yet. Upload your first resource!

help.title: Learning Resources
help.description: This page stores your uploaded learning materials and prepares them for search, chat, quiz generation, and roadmap generation.

usedForItems.store: Upload and manage documents that Aethria can use as learning context.
usedForItems.index: Extract, chunk, and index resource content so it can be searched semantically.
usedForItems.reuse: Use uploaded resources in resource chat, AI quizzes, and AI roadmaps.

howToItems.upload: Select Upload Resource, add a name and optional description, then choose a file.
howToItems.wait: Wait for upload and indexing to finish before using the resource elsewhere.
howToItems.manage: Edit resource details, download the original file, or delete resources you no longer need.
howToItems.use: Choose the resource from chat, quiz, or roadmap screens when you want AI to work from that material.

help.note: Clear file names and descriptions make resources easier to find. Larger files may take longer to upload and index.

uploadProgress.title: Uploading and indexing resource
uploadProgress.failed: Failed to upload and index resource. Please try again.
loadingMessages: Reading the file and extracting searchable text...
Splitting the content into focused study chunks...
Saving the original file and generated index...

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 1000 characters or fewer

quiz.title: Quizzes
quiz.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
quiz.empty: No quizzes yet. Create your first quiz manually or generate one with AI!

help.title: Quizzes
help.description: This page helps you create, generate, take, and review quizzes for your learning materials.

usedForItems.create: Create quizzes manually when you want full control over the questions.
usedForItems.generate: Generate quizzes with AI from a reference resource and your instructions.
usedForItems.practice: Take quizzes and review previous submissions to track understanding.

howToItems.mode: Select Create Quiz, then choose Manual or AI Generator mode.
howToItems.ai: For AI generation, choose a resource, enter the number of questions, and add focused instructions.
howToItems.attempt: Use the take quiz action to answer questions and submit your attempt.
howToItems.history: Open submission history to review scores, answers, and explanations.

help.note: For better AI quizzes, choose a focused resource and describe the topics, difficulty, or chapter you want to test.

form.name: Quiz Name
form.promptPlaceholder: e.g., Focus on chapter 3, focus on advanced concepts

aiProgress.title: Generating Quiz with AI
aiProgress.failed: Failed to generate quiz. Please try again.
loadingMessages: Scanning the resource for question-worthy details...
Shaping the key concepts into a quiz set...
Mixing easy, medium, and harder checks...
Reviewing answer choices to avoid ambiguous questions...
Packaging the quiz and saving it to your library...

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.resourceRequired: Resource is required for AI generation
validation.questionsCountRange: Number of questions must be between 1 and 50

attempt.title: Attempt Quiz: {{name}}
attempt.emptyQuestions: This quiz does not have any questions yet.

roadmap.title: Roadmaps
roadmap.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete roadmap "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
roadmap.empty: No roadmaps yet. Generate your first roadmap with AI!

help.title: Learning Roadmaps
help.description: This page helps you generate and manage AI learning roadmaps from your uploaded resources.

usedForItems.generate: Generate a structured study plan from a reference resource.
usedForItems.organize: Turn broad learning material into ordered milestones and practical steps.
usedForItems.review: Review each roadmap as written content or as a visual flowchart.

howToItems.resource: Upload or choose a resource that contains the topic you want to study.
howToItems.prompt: Add generation instructions, such as skill level, timeline, or focus areas.
howToItems.generate: Select Generate Roadmap and wait for the AI process to finish.
howToItems.open: Use the view action to open the roadmap detail and switch between content and flowchart tabs.

help.note: Better resources produce better roadmaps. Use a clear document and a specific prompt when you need a focused plan.

form.name: Roadmap Name
form.promptPlaceholder: e.g., Focus on intermediate level, structure as a 4-week plan...

aiProgress.title: Generating Roadmap with AI
aiProgress.failed: Failed to generate roadmap. Please try again.
loadingMessages: Reading the resource and identifying learning milestones...
Grouping concepts into a practical study path...
Ordering roadmap steps from foundations to applied practice...
Drafting checkpoint goals for each learning phase...
Rendering the roadmap and visual flowchart...

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.errorMessage: Failed to change password. Please check your current password and try again.

apiKey.title: API Keys
apiKey.successWarning: Please copy this API key now. For security reasons, you cannot see it again.
apiKey.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke API key "{{name}}"? Once revoked, any requests using this key will fail. This action cannot be undone.
apiKey.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to access the API!

help.title: Using API Keys with MCP
help.description: This page creates and manages API keys for external agents that connect to your Aethria MCP server.

usedForItems.manage: Create, review, and revoke keys used outside this website.
usedForItems.chat: Let your agent use Aethria MCP tools, such as listing resources and chatting with a resource.
usedForItems.secure: Keep access scoped to your account. Revoked or expired keys stop working immediately.

connectItems.create: Create an API key and copy it immediately. It is only shown once.
connectItems.url: Add this website's MCP endpoint to your agent: https://mcp.aethria.study/mcp.
connectItems.header: Configure the agent to send this HTTP header:
connectItems.tools: After connecting, the agent can call the Aethria MCP tools on your behalf.

help.note: Keep the key private and revoke it if it is exposed.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.expirationRange: Expiration must be between 1 and 365 days
